overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the navigation bridge of a vessel traveling through stormy seas at night. The scene features three navigation monitors displaying radar, charts, and depth data, with periodic lightning strikes illuminating the dark ocean ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge looking out over bow

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the navigation bridge, monitoring radar and chart displays while moving through dark waters

entered.detail: circular radar display with rotating sweep showing navigation contacts
nautical chart display showing vessel position and bathymetry
depth finder display showing water column and seabed
forward deck of the vessel with railings and navigation lights
dark stormy sea surface extending to horizon
metal structural frames of the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: View from inside a ship's navigation bridge at night, showing three illuminated monitors displaying radar, charts, and depth data. The vessel moves steadily through dark waters with the bow visible ahead, while the bridge structure provides shelter from the storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge during electrical storm

events.description: lightning bolt strikes on the port side, briefly illuminating the ocean surface

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel through stormy conditions, monitoring for weather changes

entered.detail: bright electrical discharge striking the ocean on the port side

segments.scene_description: The ship continues through the storm as a lightning bolt illuminates the port side of the vessel, creating a brief flash of natural light that contrasts with the artificial lighting of the bridge instruments.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with forward storm activity

events.description: lightning strikes directly ahead of the ship's bow, illuminating the forward path

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the storm while observing the lightning activity ahead

entered.detail: bright lightning strike visible directly ahead of the vessel's course

segments.scene_description: As the vessel progresses through the storm, lightning strikes illuminate the waters directly ahead of the bow, highlighting the ship's forward movement through the turbulent seas while the navigation monitors continue to display course information.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's navigation bridge as it pushes through a dark, stormy sea illuminated by intermittent flashes of lightning. It begins within the sheltered bridge, where the glow of three navigation monitors displaying radar, charts, and depth data contrasts with the pitch-black waters visible beyond the bow. As the vessel maintains its steady course, a sudden lightning bolt strikes the port side, momentarily flooding the scene with a sharp flash of natural light that overrides the artificial instrumentation. The camera then tracks the ship's forward momentum as subsequent lightning strikes illuminate the turbulent waves directly ahead of the bow, highlighting the vessel's progression through the storm while the monitors continue to flicker with course information.
